scripts.refs:graphql: rm -rf refs/graphql && mkdir -p refs/graphql && curl -L https://github.com/graphql/graphql-js/archive/refs/tags/v16.13.1.tar.gz | tar -xz -C refs/graphql --strip-components=1
scripts.refs:graphql-yoga: rm -rf refs/graphql-yoga && mkdir -p refs/graphql-yoga && curl -L https://github.com/dotansimha/graphql-yoga/archive/refs/tags/graphql-yoga@5.18.1.tar.gz | tar -xz -C refs/graphql-yoga --strip-components=1
